workloads.name: texture sampling/raster
workloads.description: Texture/raster workload combining texture-sampling compute with a native render_draw raster step.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Mapped to Dawn SubresourceTrackingPerf arrayLayer_16_mipLevel_3 with per-iteration normalization.

timingNormalization.note: Dawn SubresourceTrackingPerf reports per iteration (iterationsPerStep=50); Fawn repeats the combined compute+render path 500 times, disables kernel GPU timestamp queries for this lane (`--gpu-timestamp-mode off`), and normalizes to per-iteration units.

reasons: left side reported execution errors in 7/7 samples
workload is non-comparable; reliability claimability requires comparability
